reference: DESPITE THE EARLINESS OF THE HOUR A SMALL CROWD HAD GATHERED IN THE STREET OUTSIDE AND THE HORRIBLE MENACING TRELAWNEY REFRAIN OF THE FIFTEEN HUNDRED VOTING MEN CAME IN A STEADY MONOTONOUS CHANT
text: despite the earliness of the hour a small crowd had gathered in the street outside and the horrible menacing tree-long refrain of the fifteen hundred voting men came in a steady monotonous chant
